name: @fhajjej/loop-it
description: Categorized Loop goals library and Agent Skill for bounded product, design, research, content, data, operations, and engineering work with rubric evidence.

scripts.check: node --check bin/loop-it.mjs && node --check skills/loop-it/scripts/create-loop.mjs && node --check skills/loop-it/scripts/select-loop.mjs && node --check skills/loop-it/scripts/goal-library.mjs && node --check skills/loop-it/scripts/start-loop.mjs && node --check skills/loop-it/scripts/run-loop.mjs && node --check skills/loop-it/scripts/lib/codex-cli.mjs && node --check skills/loop-it/scripts/schedule-loop.mjs && node --check skills/loop-it/scripts/github-connector.mjs && node --check skills/loop-it/scripts/doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/sync-codex-plugin.mjs && node --check tests/smoke-install.mjs && node --check tests/goal-library-validation-smoke.mjs && node --check tests/prompt-only-launch-smoke.mjs && node --check tests/public-install-smoke.mjs && node --check tests/run-proof-smoke.mjs && node --check tests/readiness-preflight-smoke.mjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['.codex-plugin/plugin.json','.claude-plugin/plugin.json','.cursor-plugin/plugin.json','skills/loop-it/references/library/loops.json','skills/loop-it/references/library/schema.json','skills/loop-it/references/library/evals.json','skills/loop-it/references/library/goals.json','skills/loop-it/references/library/goals-schema.json','skills/loop-it/references/library/goals-evals.json'].forEach((file)=>JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8')))" && node tests/goal-library-validation-smoke.mjs && node tests/prompt-only-launch-smoke.mjs && node skills/loop-it/scripts/select-loop.mjs eval && node skills/loop-it/scripts/goal-library.mjs eval && npm run smoke && npm run smoke:run-proof && npm run smoke:readiness && npm pack --dry-run
